LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-26-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 FOR EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON CLAIMANT KATRINA RUIZ' CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION. CT WILL NOTICE KATRINA RUIZ, SO SHALL COUNSEL NTC THE MOVING PARTY. (REPORTER: ERIC L. THRONE, CSR #7855)

MEMO OF P&A IN OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION
ORDER DENYING CLAIM TO RIGHT OF POSSESSION
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION: OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. THIS MATTER WAS CONTINUED FROM FEBRUARY 13, 2002 FOR THE PURPOSE OF AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON KATRINA RUIZ'S CLAIM FOR RIGHT OF POSSESSION. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY KATRINA RUIZ, THE COURT DENIED HER CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE. CSR 7855 (GPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Todd Rothbard, Esq. 408/244-4200 for Plaintiff PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION opposing party
This matter was continued from February 13, 2002 for the purpose of an evidentiary hearing on KATRINA RUIZ's claim for right of possession. Counsel represented in open court that notice of this hearing was given. Deputy Clerk Garth Sayers also represented in open court that the Sheriff's Department effected service on Ms. Ruiz. There being no appearance by KATRINA RUIZ, the Court DENIED her claim of right of possession. Order signed in open court. (JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Continued To Feb-26-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Horowitz, Esq., 408-244-4200, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Pacific Acquisitions Corporation.

This matter was continued to February 26, 2002, at 9:30 a.m. for evidentiary hearing on claimant Katrina Ruiz' claim of right of possession . The Court will notice Katrina Ruiz. So shall counsel notice the moving party. (JJM/KH) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
